description: Replace Substring is a ProtoFlux node that replaces the all occurrences of SearchFor (String) in Str (String) with ReplaceWith (String).

fields.Str: The string to search for SearchFor (String) in.
fields.SearchFor: The string to be replacing in Str (String).
fields.ComparasonMode: The mode used to compare the string before evaluation of the replace.
fields.* ([[Type:String|String]]): Returns Str (String) with all occurrences of SearchFor (String) replaced with ReplaceWith (String).
